title: Heterophyllaea fiebrigii
taxonomy: Heterophyllaea fiebrigii is a plant species native to South America. It is classified under the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. The genus Heterophyllaea is part of the tribe Spermacoceae. This species is a shrub or small tree, and it is endemic to the subtropical regions of Argentina and Chile. Further classification of Heterophyllaea fiebrigii at the rank of species or infraspecific level may vary depending on the source.
